acceptance.after: Classified as expected checkpoint-vs-MHR-asset split, not evidence of random/zero modules. The modules are used by decode via MHRHead.mhr_forward/self.mhr, but they are supplied by mhr_model.pt before model.ckpt strict-false load. Caveat: W6 gate JSON does not record decoder checkpoint/asset paths.
acceptance.target: Trace whether missing keys are unused or used/random-init, with evidence paths.

acceptance.after: --scale-source field is a harness no-op in gate_check.py: _extract_frames reads smplx_params but never stores smplx_params.scale; later frame.get('scale') is always absent. Scale is semantically used by mhr_decode/MHRHead when actually passed.
acceptance.target: Trace --scale-source through gate_check.py/mhr_decode and decide bug vs unused semantics.

acceptance.baseline: Wave-5 baseline worst joints 220.269673 mm; patched/field worst joints 233.008878 mm.
acceptance.after: W6 worst joints 233.008760 mm, mesh-skel worst p95 53.499985 mm. W6 233 mm joint miss is consistent with the known wave-5 measured-partial state, not new; W6 vertex worst 227.613832 mm is larger than W5 patched 168.797847 mm. Metric keys match; BODY producer checkpoints/model ids are same family, but W6 decoder asset paths are not recorded in report JSON.
acceptance.target: Compare setup, checkpoints/assets, metric keys, and whether hundreds-of-mm was already seen.

acceptance.after: One-page adjudication table written with mechanism, evidence path, and exact correct invocation/fix status for missing keys, scale no-op, hand-pose omission, and W5/W6 setup.

changes: runs/lanes/w6_gate1b_harnessdiag_20260708/REPORT.md:1 added read-only diagnosis artifact with findings, adjudication table, honest issues, and proposed bullet.

full_suite.command: N/A read-only diagnosis. Verification commands run: git branch --show-current; git status --short; jq/diff/shasum/nl evidence inspections; no repo test suite required or run.

honest_issues: No GPU was used and no source file was edited, per lane rule.
Could not run actual MHR decode CPU-side locally: mhr_decode reports MHR_RUNTIME_AVAILABLE=False because roma is missing, and repo-local Fast-SAM checkpoint/assets are absent.

The W6 gate1b_harness directory in this checkout contains only two JSON reports; no W6 stdout/stderr log with the missing-key dump was present there. The inspected missing-key dump is from runs/lanes/w5_p22latent_20260707/vm_evidence/frame_distribution_check2.log.
The W6 none/field reports are not byte-identical by fresh SHA/diff; they are semantically equivalent for the gate verdicts, with only scale_source, wall time, and tiny floating jitter differences.
Additional harness issue found: gate_check.py also drops nonzero left/right hand pose, so even a fixed scale flag would still not be a faithful persisted-frame decode until hand_pose is passed.
next: Proposed bullet: GATE-1b harness diagnosis: current GATE-1b numbers are not a clean decode-fidelity verdict. Missing character_torch keys are expected asset-split noise if mhr_model.pt is correct, but the harness drops real scale and nonzero hand pose from body_mesh.json, and it fails to record decoder checkpoint/asset provenance. Wave-5 already showed ~220-233 mm joint round-trip misses; fix harness field plumbing/provenance before any GPU re-spend.
